ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Peptide sequence */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the peptide */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide */,
  "charge_state" INTEGER /* Charge state of the peptide */,
  "retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the peptide in the chromatogram */,
  "precursor_mz" REAL /* Precursor m/z value of the peptide */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (mzML, mzXML, CSV) */,
  "source_file" TEXT /* Source file from which the peptide data was extracted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein modification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein modification */,
  "mass_shift" REAL /* Mass shift caused by the modification */,
  "site_specificity" TEXT /* Specificity of the modification to certain amino acids */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_modifications" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being modified */,
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein modification */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the modification in the peptide sequence */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the modification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the modification */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the modification has been confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id", "modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the experiment belongs to */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_data" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the run belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument used for the run */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the run was performed */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who performed the run */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used for the run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "biological_origin" TEXT /* Biological origin of the sample */,
  "preparation_method" TEXT /* Method used to prepare the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_quantification" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being quantified */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the data belongs to */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the peptide */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the peptide */,
  "isotope_label" TEXT /* Isotope label used for quantification */,
  "quantification_method" TEXT /* Method used for quantification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id", "run_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_identification" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being identified */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being identified */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the run the data belongs to */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the protein identification */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the protein identification */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the identification has been confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id", "peptide_id", "run_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide being accessed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accession" (
  "accession_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accession number */,
  "accession_number" TEXT /* Accession number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accession number */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Database from which the accession number is derived */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species associated with the accession number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accession_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "found_by" (
  "found_by_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each found by information */,
  "found_by_name" TEXT /* Name of the found by information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the found by information */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("found_by_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ascore" (
  "ascore_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ascore information */,
  "ascore_value" REAL /* Ascore value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ascore information */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the ascore is valid */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the ascore */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ascore_id")
)
